General.Name: Founder Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Founder Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the sale of software, hardware and system integration in Mainland China, Hong Kong, and internationally. It also involved in the property holding business. Founder Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Cable TV Tower, Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong
